positive: A stylized, symmetrical, geometric illustration of a celestial forest grove. The main subject is a central, glowing constellation forming an ethereal archway, framed by abstract, stylized bioluminescent trees and winding cosmic vines. The design must utilize clean, bold silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and indigo background, contrasted with bursts of metallic gold and cyan energy. The overall composition should be highly repeatable and suitable for screen printing or apparel transfer, maintaining excellent detail retention and strong contrast for visibility on fabric. Art Deco, Art Nouveau influence, high contrast, vector graphic aesthetic.
